name: @blackbelt-technology/pi-dashboard-authoring-toolkit
description: General-purpose authoring skills for pi sessions — skill-creator (author/update skills), skill-to-subagent (wrap a skill as a subagent), session-to-guideline (turn a pi session JSONL transcript into a how-we-did-it Markdown playbook), and faq-mine (mine docs + memory stores into a FAQ). Pure-skill package, no extension.ts. skill-creator adapted from Anthropic's skill-creator (MIT).
